mapper.select: select a.reqid, a.approvalid, a.approvalname, a.seq, a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.approverid , a.approvername , a.requesterid, a.requestername, to_char(a.reqdate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as reqdate, to_char(a.approvedate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as approvedate, a.reqreason , null as custid from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a where a.reqid = ( select max(reqid) from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq where approvalid = #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and requesterid = #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

select a.reqid, a.approvalid, a.approvalname, a.seq, a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.approverid , a.approvername , a.requesterid, a.requestername, to_char(a.reqdate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as reqdate, to_char(a.approvedate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as approvedate, a.reqreason , null as custid from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a order by reqid desc
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq (reqid, approvalid, approvalname, seq, phase, jobid, version, approverid, approvername, requesterid, requestername, reqdate, approvedate,reqreason) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, null, #{reqreason, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq (reqid, approvalid, approvalname, seq, phase, jobid, version, approverid, approvername, requesterid, requestername, reqdate, approvedate, reqreason) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, null, #{reqreason, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select a.reqid, a.approvalid, a.approvalname, a.seq, a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.approverid , a.approvername , a.requesterid, a.requestername, to_char(a.reqdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as reqdate, to_char(a.approvedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as approvedate, a.reqreason, null as custid from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set phase= 'APPROVED', approvedate = SYSDATE where reqid= #{reqid}
update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set phase= 'REJECTED', approvedate = SYSDATE where reqid= #{reqid}
update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set seq= #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approvedate = SYSDATE where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select reqid, approvalid, approvalname, seq, phase, jobid, version, approverid, approvername, requesterid, requestername, reqdate, approvedate, reqreason ,(case when approvalid = 'RESTORE_APPROVAL' then (select custid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore where restoreid=f.jobid) else null end) as custid from ( select ROWNUM rn, reqid, approvalid, approvalname, seq, phase, jobid, version, approverid, approvername, requesterid, requestername, reqdate, approvedate, reqreason from ( select a.reqid, a.approvalid, a.approvalname, a.seq, a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.approverid , a.approvername , a.requesterid, a.requestername, to_char(a.reqdate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as reqdate, to_char(a.approvedate,'yyyy/mm/dd HH24:MI:SS') as approvedate, a.reqreason from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a order by a.reqid desc ) r where
and upper(requesterid) = upper(#{search1})
and upper(approverid) = upper(#{search2})
and upper(phase) = upper(#{search3})
ROWNUM <= #{pagenum} * #{amount} order by reqid desc ) f where rn > (#{pagenum} -1) * #{amount} order by reqid desc
